hooks.command: FILE=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null) && [ -n "$FILE" ] && [ -f "$FILE" ] && case "$FILE" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.json|*.css) command -v npx >/dev/null 2>&1 && npx --yes prettier --write "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; *.py) command -v ruff >/dev/null 2>&1 && ruff format "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || command -v black >/dev/null 2>&1 && black -q "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; *.rs) command -v rustfmt >/dev/null 2>&1 && rustfmt "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; *.go) command -v gofmt >/dev/null 2>&1 && gofmt -w "$FILE" 2>/dev/null || true ;; esac || true
